title: Impression OS Build Plan
description: The deterministic output of the planner and the input to the builder. It names a theme and an ordered list of sections, each pairing a recipe with the concrete content that fills its content contract. This is the boundary between intent (the brief) and compilation (the builder).

brief.description: Path or id of the brief this plan was derived from.

theme.description: A theme name that exists in tokens/manifest.json (light | dark | brand.example | …).

seo.description: Optional page metadata. Anything omitted is derived deterministically from meta.name and the hero content.

sections.description: Ordered sections. Order is page order, reading order, and tab order.

recipe.description: The name of an existing recipe.

content.description: Content matching that recipe's content contract.
